log Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual log Directory Reference(3)

NAME

log Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file colorize.h
Log message colorization for terminal output. file format.h
file grep.h
file io.h
Capture stdout/stderr and redirect to logging system. file json.h
📝 JSON structured logging output file log.h
📝 Logging API with multiple log levels and terminal output control file mmap.h
Lock-free memory-mapped text logging with crash safety. file named.h
Format named objects in log messages (replaces hex addresses with type/name descriptions). file search.h
Interactive search filtering for terminal screens. file types.h
Log level types and constants. file websocket.h
Libwebsockets logging integration.

Version 0.9.19 ascii-chat
